notableEvents.label: Cody Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cody Freeman lines out to left fielder Trevor Larnach.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue walks. Kyle Higashioka to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Royce Lewis. Justin Foscue out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Royce Lewis. Justin Foscue out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nicky Lopez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nicky Lopez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Cody Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cody Freeman grounds out, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue homers (4) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach grounds into a double play, first baseman Jake Burger to shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Luke Keaschall out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler lines out to center fielder Alejandro Osuna.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field. Victor Caratini scores.
